# WanderPool
> Adventure experience marketplace for India — Uttarakhand first

WanderPool lets travelers book verified adventure experiences (river rafting, trekking, paragliding,
camping, yoga retreats) with local operators in India, starting with Uttarakhand (Rishikesh, Haridwar,
Mussoorie).

## Key pages
- https://wanderpool.com — Home, browse featured experiences
- https://wanderpool.com/experiences — Browse all experiences with filters
- https://wanderpool.com/for-operators — List your adventure business on WanderPool
- https://wanderpool.com/about — About WanderPool
- https://wanderpool.com/safety — Safety standards and how we vet operators
- https://wanderpool.com/contact — Contact support

## What we offer
- Instant online booking with Razorpay
- Verified operators (ID + certifications + video call)
- 3 cancellation policy tiers — free cancel up to 48 hours available
- Post-activity review system (verified buyers only)
- WhatsApp + email booking confirmations

## Business
- Commission: 12–15% per booking; operators receive 85–88%
- Primary region: Uttarakhand (Rishikesh, Haridwar, Mussoorie)
- Contact: support@wanderpool.com
